profiles.name: Jordan
profiles.bio: Weekend trail hiker and amateur photographer. Always chasing a good view.

profiles.name: Riley
profiles.bio: Plays in a local band and cooks way too much pasta. Looking for a duet partner.

profiles.name: Casey
profiles.bio: Gallery hopper and slow traveler. Will talk about color theory for hours.

profiles.name: Morgan
profiles.bio: Home cook, hiker, and weekend museum wanderer.

profiles.name: Taylor
profiles.bio: Vinyl collector and aspiring world traveler. Recommend me a record.

profiles.name: Avery
profiles.bio: Half-marathoner training for a full. My ideal first date involves espresso and a long walk to nowhere in particular.

profiles.name: Quinn
profiles.bio: Film school dropout, now a barista with strong opinions on both pour-overs and third acts. Tuesday matinees are sacred.

profiles.name: Rowan
profiles.bio: Found bouldering during the pandemic and never looked back. Will belay you through your first top-rope climb, promise.

profiles.name: Sage
profiles.bio: Librarian by day, book club tyrant by night. Currently reading three novels at once and finishing none of them.

profiles.name: Emery
profiles.bio: Pastry cook at a small bakery — yes, I will bring croissants on the second date. Runner, but only when it's under 25 degrees.

profiles.name: Blake
profiles.bio: Touring jazz bassist settling back home. Looking for someone to drag to live shows and tiny noodle bars.

profiles.name: Hayden
profiles.bio: Backpacked four continents, now planning the fifth. Fluent in three languages and bad puns in all of them.

matches.note: Runners who both rank coffee shops by espresso quality. First date set for Saturday.
Argued about a film adaptation for an hour and loved it.
Rowan liked the climbing photos from Kalymnos.
Bonded over jazz biographies in the prompts.
Vinyl vs. film schedules never lined up.
